rationale.root_cause: They attributed the failure to a typo in default/berry.c, not the defect at src/be_code.c:317 in free_suffix. The required location (be_code.c:317) was neither identified nor discussed.
rationale.local_fix: They proposed changing a help string in default/berry.c, not modifying the conditional at src/be_code.c:317 to match the patch. No code change was suggested at the correct site.
rationale.global_fix: Their explanation focuses on CLI output mismatch from a misspelled string rather than the underlying register-freeing condition bug in free_suffix. It does not explain why the be_code.c:317 bug exists.
